# TiledStyleBinding.WidgetName property

The bound widget's name (e.g. `"Vignette"`, `"Board_Info"`, `"Paragon_Points_Container"`). Names are useful for the consumer to attribute the overlay to a specific visual element; semantic-role naming is the consumer's (per memory `feedback_widget-name-not-role`).

```csharp
public string WidgetName { get; set; }
```
